qc.notes: The recurring man is the channel's real face — his head, neck, limbs and hands must be anatomically perfect in every frame (a twisted or backwards head, or fused/extra fingers, is an automatic fail). His clothing must match the survival scenario stated in the prompt (ski gear, driving clothes, hiking outfit, 1943 naval uniform, desert clothing etc.); a wrong-scenario or wrong-era outfit is a fail. He must never appear to speak or lip-sync. Snow spray, murky water, smoke, fire glow, dust, heat shimmer and motion blur are INTENDED atmosphere, not defects. No burned-in overlay text (all overlays are added in post).

art_style: Visceral first-person survival cinema — a photoreal, grounded 9:16 vertical thriller that puts the viewer INSIDE one life-or-death situation per episode. Every shot looks like a real place with real physics: authentic terrain, weather, water, fire, snow, machinery and equipment, rich atmospheric detail (spindrift, smoke, silt, embers, heat shimmer) and natural, motivated light only. Shallow depth of field, subtle handheld urgency on close shots, vast awe-inducing wides for scale; immersive eye-level and over-the-shoulder framing that makes the danger personal. A single recurring man — 'the survivor', the channel's face — is the viewer's body inside the scene: he NEVER speaks, lip-syncs or mouths words (his voice is added afterward as narration). His clothing always matches the scenario and is stated explicitly per shot. Intense, physical and frightening in scale but NEVER gory, bloody or graphic — the danger lives in physics, time and distance, not in injury detail. No captions, no subtitles, no on-screen text, no logos or watermarks.

characters.name: Ihsan
characters.bio: Kanalın yüzü — İhsan'ın kendi figürü, 'the survivor' olarak: izleyicinin sahnedeki bedeni. Her bölüm gerçek bir ölüm-kalım durumunun içinde bulur kendini; kararları anlatım izleyiciye sorar. Kamerada ASLA konuşmaz (ikinci-şahıs anlatım sonradan eklenir). Her bölümde aynı yüz; kıyafeti senaryoya göre değişir ve her çekimde açıkça yazılır.
characters.appearance: A 30-year-old Turkish man with warm olive skin, dark brown eyes, thick dark eyebrows, and a full, neatly groomed black beard and moustache. Short dark brown-black hair. Athletic lean-muscular build with broad shoulders. A calm, focused, quietly determined face — the face of a man thinking his way out of danger. In EVERY episode he wears strictly SCENARIO-APPROPRIATE clothing (specified per shot); no visible tattoos, no watch unless the scenario calls for it. Realistic, grounded, cinematic.
